title: rubus thyrsanthus var. velutinus
intro: Rubus thyrsanthus var. velutinus, also known as the Velvet Raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus thyrsanthus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The Velvet Raspberry has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits include promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
